metadata.description: Plain-language data dictionary for the metrics used in the Networks of War graph.
metadata.timeframes: The graph can show metrics from a war participant's first year, last year, or all available years in the selected war.
metadata.missingValues: Unknown or not-applicable values stay unknown. They are not silently treated as zero unless the project can tell that zero is the correct value.

controls.country: Filter the war list to conflicts that include the selected country. Some wars also include non-state participants, which remain visible after a war is selected.
controls.war: Choose the conflict network to display. The list follows the selected war-type and country filters.
controls.timeframe: Choose whether the metric describes the first year, last year, or all available years of the selected war.
controls.node_size: Choose a participant metric to scale node sizes. Larger values make larger nodes; unknown selected values are labeled Unknown in participant tooltips.
controls.link_dash: Choose a relationship metric to draw dashed blue links. A dashed link means that relationship is present for the pair in the selected timeframe.

terrorism_deaths.label: Terrorism Deaths
terrorism_deaths.calculation: Counts people killed in terrorist incidents associated with the participant country, then averages those yearly counts across the selected timeframe.

mid_dyads.label: MID Dyads
mid_dyads.source: Correlates of War, Militarized Interstate Disputes
mid_dyads.calculation: Counts distinct militarized dispute dyads involving the participant country, then averages those yearly counts across the selected timeframe.

mid_dyads_initiated.label: MID Dyads Initiated
mid_dyads_initiated.source: Correlates of War, Militarized Interstate Disputes
mid_dyads_initiated.calculation: Counts distinct militarized dispute dyads where the participant country is coded as an initiator, then averages those yearly counts across the selected timeframe.

mid_dyads_targeted.label: MID Dyads Targeted
mid_dyads_targeted.source: Correlates of War, Militarized Interstate Disputes
mid_dyads_targeted.calculation: Counts distinct militarized dispute dyads where the participant country is coded as a target, then averages those yearly counts across the selected timeframe.

mid_dyads_joined.label: MID Dyads Joined
mid_dyads_joined.source: Correlates of War, Militarized Interstate Disputes
mid_dyads_joined.calculation: Counts distinct militarized dispute dyads where the participant country is coded as joining an existing dispute, then averages those yearly counts across the selected timeframe.

allied_countries.label: Allied Countries
allied_countries.calculation: Counts countries with a defense, neutrality, nonaggression, or entente alliance with the participant country, then averages those yearly counts across the selected timeframe.

trade_countries.label: Trade Countries
trade_countries.source: Correlates of War, Trade Data Set
trade_countries.calculation: Counts countries that traded with the participant country in a year, then averages those yearly counts across the selected timeframe.

money_flow_in.label: Money Flow In
money_flow_in.source: Correlates of War, Trade Data Set
money_flow_in.calculation: Sums imports into the participant country from its trade partners, then averages those yearly totals across the selected timeframe. The source reports millions of dollars; the graph displays dollars.

money_flow_out.label: Money Flow Out
money_flow_out.source: Correlates of War, Trade Data Set
money_flow_out.calculation: Sums partner imports from the participant country, then averages those yearly totals across the selected timeframe. The source reports millions of dollars; the graph displays dollars.

imports.label: Imports
imports.source: Correlates of War, Trade Data Set
imports.calculation: Uses the participant country's national import totals, then averages those yearly totals across the selected timeframe. The source reports millions of dollars; the graph displays dollars.

exports.label: Exports
exports.source: Correlates of War, Trade Data Set
exports.calculation: Uses the participant country's national export totals, then averages those yearly totals across the selected timeframe. The source reports millions of dollars; the graph displays dollars.

military_expenditure.label: Military Expenditure
military_expenditure.source: Correlates of War, National Material Capabilities
military_expenditure.calculation: Uses the participant country's military spending from the National Material Capabilities study, then averages yearly values across the selected timeframe. The source reports thousands of historical currency units; the graph displays single units. Values before 1914 are British pounds, and values from 1914 onward are US dollars.

military_personnel.label: Military Personnel
military_personnel.source: Correlates of War, National Material Capabilities
military_personnel.calculation: Uses the participant country's active military personnel, then averages yearly values across the selected timeframe. The source reports thousands of people; the graph displays people.

iron_steel_production.label: Iron And Steel Production
iron_steel_production.source: Correlates of War, National Material Capabilities
iron_steel_production.calculation: Uses the participant country's iron and steel production, then averages yearly values across the selected timeframe. The source reports thousands of tons; the graph displays tons.

energy_consumption.label: Energy Consumption
energy_consumption.source: Correlates of War, National Material Capabilities
energy_consumption.calculation: Uses the participant country's primary energy consumption, then averages yearly values across the selected timeframe. The source reports thousands of coal-ton equivalents; the graph displays coal-ton equivalents.

population.label: Population
population.source: Correlates of War, National Material Capabilities
population.calculation: Uses the participant country's total population, then averages yearly values across the selected timeframe. The source reports thousands of people; the graph displays people.

urban_population.label: Urban Population
urban_population.source: Correlates of War, National Material Capabilities
urban_population.calculation: Uses the participant country's urban population, then averages yearly values across the selected timeframe. The source reports thousands of people; the graph displays people.

urban_population_growth_rate.label: Urban Population Growth Rate
urban_population_growth_rate.source: Correlates of War, National Material Capabilities
urban_population_growth_rate.calculation: Uses the participant country's urban population growth rate, then averages yearly values across the selected timeframe.

cinc_score.label: CINC Score
cinc_score.source: Correlates of War, National Material Capabilities
cinc_score.calculation: Calculates each country's share of the world total for six capability components: military spending, military personnel, iron and steel production, energy use, total population, and urban population. The six shares are averaged into one capability score.

arms_technologies_used.label: Arms Technologies Used
arms_technologies_used.source: Correlates of War, Arms Technology Dataset
arms_technologies_used.calculation: Counts arms technologies used by the participant country in a year, excluding the source's aggregate total row, then averages those yearly counts across the selected timeframe.

co2_emissions_per_capita.label: CO2 Emissions Per Capita
co2_emissions_per_capita.source: Our World in Data, CO2 Emissions Per Capita
co2_emissions_per_capita.calculation: Uses fossil carbon dioxide emissions per person for the participant country, then averages yearly values across the selected timeframe. These figures exclude land-use change emissions.

land_mass_exchange_gain.label: Land Mass Exchange Gain
land_mass_exchange_gain.source: Correlates of War, Territorial Change Dataset
land_mass_exchange_gain.calculation: Sums territory gained by the participant country in a year, then averages yearly gains across the selected timeframe.

population_exchange_gain.label: Population Exchange Gain
population_exchange_gain.source: Correlates of War, Territorial Change Dataset
population_exchange_gain.calculation: Sums the population living in territory gained by the participant country in a year, then averages yearly gains across the selected timeframe.

land_mass_exchange_loss.label: Land Mass Exchange Loss
land_mass_exchange_loss.source: Correlates of War, Territorial Change Dataset
land_mass_exchange_loss.calculation: Sums territory lost by the participant country in a year, then averages yearly losses across the selected timeframe.

population_exchange_loss.label: Population Exchange Loss
population_exchange_loss.source: Correlates of War, Territorial Change Dataset
population_exchange_loss.calculation: Sums the population living in territory lost by the participant country in a year, then averages yearly losses across the selected timeframe.

refugees_originated.label: Refugees Originated
refugees_originated.source: United States Committee for Refugees and Immigrants, Forcibly Displaced Populations
refugees_originated.calculation: Uses the number of refugees originating from the participant country, then averages yearly values across the selected timeframe. The source reports thousands of people; the graph displays people.

refugees_hosted.label: Refugees Hosted
refugees_hosted.source: United States Committee for Refugees and Immigrants, Forcibly Displaced Populations
refugees_hosted.calculation: Uses the number of refugees hosted by the participant country, then averages yearly values across the selected timeframe. The source reports thousands of people; the graph displays people.

internally_displaced_persons.label: Internally Displaced Persons
internally_displaced_persons.source: United States Committee for Refugees and Immigrants, Forcibly Displaced Populations
internally_displaced_persons.calculation: Uses the number of internally displaced people in the participant country, then averages yearly values across the selected timeframe. The source reports thousands of people; the graph displays people.

concurrent_wars.label: Concurrent Wars
concurrent_wars.source: Calculated from this project's war-participant data
concurrent_wars.calculation: Counts how many other wars involved the same country in the same year, then averages those yearly counts across the selected timeframe. Multi-year timeframes can therefore show fractional average war counts.

days_at_war.label: Days At War
days_at_war.source: Calculated from this project's participant start and end dates
days_at_war.calculation: Counts the inclusive number of days the participant is active in the war. For ongoing wars, the current date is used as the temporary end date.

battle_deaths.label: Battle Deaths
battle_deaths.source: Correlates of War interstate, intra-state, extra-state, and dyadic war studies, with documented project adjustments
battle_deaths.calculation: Uses the participant's battle-death total from the war records. When a source provides only a range or category, the project uses its documented representative estimate.

battle_deaths_per_day.label: Battle Deaths Per Day
battle_deaths_per_day.source: Calculated from this project's battle-death totals and participant date spans
battle_deaths_per_day.calculation: Divides participant battle deaths by days at war and rounds to two decimal places.

territory_exchange.label: Territory Exchange
territory_exchange.source: Correlates of War, Territorial Change Dataset
territory_exchange.calculation: Marks a pair when one country gained or lost territory to the other during the selected timeframe.

colonial_contiguity.label: Colonial Contiguity
colonial_contiguity.source: Correlates of War, Colonial Dependency Contiguity Dataset
colonial_contiguity.calculation: Marks a pair when the countries are connected through colonial dependency contiguity during the selected timeframe.

contiguity.label: Contiguity
contiguity.source: Correlates of War, Direct Contiguity Dataset
contiguity.calculation: Marks a pair when the countries share a direct land or sea contiguity relationship during the selected timeframe.

alliance.label: Alliance
alliance.calculation: Marks a pair when the countries have a defense, neutrality, nonaggression, or entente alliance during the selected timeframe.

defense_cooperation_agreements.label: Defense Cooperation Agreements
defense_cooperation_agreements.calculation: Marks a pair when the countries have a defense cooperation agreement during the selected timeframe.

inter_governmental_organizations.label: Intergovernmental Organizations
inter_governmental_organizations.source: Correlates of War, Intergovernmental Organizations Dataset
inter_governmental_organizations.calculation: Marks a pair when the countries share at least one intergovernmental organization membership during the selected timeframe.

diplomatic_exchange.label: Diplomatic Exchange
diplomatic_exchange.source: Correlates of War, Diplomatic Exchange Dataset
diplomatic_exchange.calculation: Marks a pair when the countries have a diplomatic exchange relationship during the selected timeframe.

trade_relations.label: Trade Relations
trade_relations.source: Correlates of War, Trade Data Set
trade_relations.calculation: Marks a pair when either country reports positive trade with the other during the selected timeframe.

same_leader_type.label: Same Leader Type
same_leader_type.calculation: Marks a pair when both countries have the same broad leader-type profile during the selected timeframe.

military_leaders.label: Military Leaders
military_leaders.calculation: Marks a pair when both countries are led by military leaders during the selected timeframe.

communist_leaders.label: Communist Leaders
communist_leaders.calculation: Marks a pair when both countries are led by communist leaders during the selected timeframe.

royal_leaders.label: Royal Leaders
royal_leaders.calculation: Marks a pair when both countries are led by royal leaders during the selected timeframe.

democratic_incumbent.label: Democratic Incumbent
democratic_incumbent.calculation: Marks a pair when both countries have democratically selected incumbents during the selected timeframe.

unconstitutional_incumbent.label: Unconstitutional Incumbent
unconstitutional_incumbent.calculation: Marks a pair when both countries have unconstitutional incumbents during the selected timeframe.

democratic_regimes.label: Democratic Regimes
democratic_regimes.calculation: Marks a pair when both countries are coded as democratic regimes during the selected timeframe.

dictatorships.label: Dictatorships
dictatorships.calculation: Marks a pair when both countries are coded as dictatorships during the selected timeframe.

collective_leaderships.label: Collective Leaderships
collective_leaderships.calculation: Marks a pair when both countries have collective leadership during the selected timeframe.

direct_election.label: Direct Election
direct_election.calculation: Marks a pair when both countries choose leaders by direct election during the selected timeframe.

indirect_election.label: Indirect Election
indirect_election.calculation: Marks a pair when both countries choose leaders by indirect election during the selected timeframe.

non_elected_leaders.label: Non-Elected Leaders
non_elected_leaders.calculation: Marks a pair when both countries have non-elected leaders during the selected timeframe.

no_legislature.label: No Legislature
no_legislature.calculation: Marks a pair when neither country has a legislature during the selected timeframe.

non_elective_legislature.label: Non-Elective Legislature
non_elective_legislature.calculation: Marks a pair when both countries have non-elective legislatures during the selected timeframe.

elective_legislature.label: Elective Legislature
elective_legislature.calculation: Marks a pair when both countries have elective legislatures during the selected timeframe.

no_partisan_legislature_legal.label: No Partisan Legislature Legal
no_partisan_legislature_legal.calculation: Marks a pair when neither country legally allows partisan activity in the legislature during the selected timeframe.

no_non_regime_legislature_parties_legal.label: No Non-Regime Legislature Parties Legal
no_non_regime_legislature_parties_legal.calculation: Marks a pair when both countries legally restrict legislature parties outside the ruling regime during the selected timeframe.

multi_party_legislature_legal.label: Multi-Party Legislature Legal
multi_party_legislature_legal.calculation: Marks a pair when both countries legally allow multi-party legislatures during the selected timeframe.

all_parties_illegal.label: All Parties Illegal
all_parties_illegal.calculation: Marks a pair when all political parties are illegal in both countries during the selected timeframe.

single_party_state_exists.label: Single-Party State Exists
single_party_state_exists.calculation: Marks a pair when both countries have single-party state systems during the selected timeframe.

multi_party_state_exists.label: Multi-Party State Exists
multi_party_state_exists.calculation: Marks a pair when both countries have multi-party state systems during the selected timeframe.

no_parties_exist.label: No Parties Exist
no_parties_exist.calculation: Marks a pair when no political parties exist in either country during the selected timeframe.

one_party_exists.label: One Party Exists
one_party_exists.calculation: Marks a pair when one political party exists in both countries during the selected timeframe.

no_non_regime_parties_exist.label: No Non-Regime Parties Exist
no_non_regime_parties_exist.calculation: Marks a pair when no parties outside the ruling regime exist in either country during the selected timeframe.

leader_died.label: No Leader Death
leader_died.calculation: Marks a pair when neither country is coded with a leader death during the selected timeframe.

new_leader.label: New Leader
new_leader.calculation: Marks a pair when both countries are coded with a new leader during the selected timeframe.

transition_to_democracy.label: Transition To Democracy
transition_to_democracy.calculation: Marks a pair when both countries transition to democracy during the selected timeframe.

transition_to_dictatorship.label: Transition To Dictatorship
transition_to_dictatorship.calculation: Marks a pair when both countries transition to dictatorship during the selected timeframe.

atop.label: ATOP Alliance
atop.source: Alliance Treaty Obligations and Provisions Project
atop.calculation: Marks a pair when the countries are linked by an alliance treaty in the ATOP study during the selected timeframe.

mtops.label: MTOPS Territorial Claim
mtops.source: Issue Correlates of War, Militarized Territorial Claims
mtops.calculation: Marks a pair when the countries have a militarized territorial claim relationship during the selected timeframe.

shared_arms_technology.label: Shared Arms Technology
shared_arms_technology.source: Correlates of War, Arms Technology Dataset
shared_arms_technology.calculation: Marks a pair when both countries use at least one of the same arms technologies during the selected timeframe.
